title: Replace direct process.env in runtime code
description: Replace direct process.env usage in runtime code with app-config/lib/env. Prioritise database/db.ts and lib/env.ts; follow-up plan for scripts and tests.

title: Triage and fix 'no-any' TypeScript warnings
description: Review top 'no-any' warnings; add proper types or justify exceptions. Create a follow-up plan before touching >7 files.

title: Investigate Vitest OOM on local runner
description: Vitest crashed with JS heap out-of-memory locally. Investigate test memory usage and recommend running full test suite in CI or splitting tests.
